Current Question Text: Date/time when payment given to participant- autogenerated or sent by site
Notes: This will be a repeated measures variable associated with Round and set any time HDPaym_PaymIssued_v1r0 is updated. When calling the incentiveCompleted API and declaring an incentive completed or refused by a participant, the sites can send their own timestamp in the call but if they don't provide one, NCI will generate it ourselves; Updated Secondary Source to Collection Details and Variable name HDPaym_TmPaym_v1r0 with HDPaym_TmPaymBL_v1r0
Dictionary: Study Manager Data Dictionary, Biospecimen Research
